evaluation_method: Machine translation evaluation on WMT'16 datasets for German-English, English-German, English-Romanian, and Romanian-English pairs from the First Conference on Machine Translation (WMT) 2016. Models generate translations of source-language sentences into the target language. Evaluation uses BLEU score computed with multi-bleu.perl using XLM's tokenization, as specified in the GPT-3 paper. The WMT16 Metrics Shared Task also evaluated 16 additional metrics from 9 research groups using system-level and segment-level correlation with human judgments.
